please_give_details_of_your_notice_perio:
My current notice period under my employment contract with Herbert Smith Freehills LLP is three months. The notice must be given in writing and runs from the next working day after the date on which notice is formally submitted to HR.

Practically, this means that if I were to receive and accept an offer from Volterra Fietta, I would be able to:
- Submit notice immediately upon signing the employment contract; and
- Work my full three‑month notice period, during which I would aim to transition my active case load (primarily investment treaty and commercial arbitrations seated in London, Paris and Singapore) to other team members and ensure a smooth handover of client relationships and ongoing procedural deadlines.

I currently have the following constraints and flexibilities:
- I have no outstanding sabbatical or long‑term leave booked. I do, however, have approximately eight days of accrued but untaken annual leave, which may slightly reduce my physical presence during the final weeks of my notice period depending on how my current employer prefers to structure my departure.
- I am leading a small team on a merits hearing scheduled for 2025-03-10 to 2025-03-14 in a UNCITRAL arbitration. Out of professional courtesy, I would prefer, if possible, to time my transition so that I can either (a) complete that hearing before joining Volterra Fietta or (b) agree a clear cut‑off date with both firms so that there is no conflict of interest or disruption to the client.

Assuming a standard recruitment timeline, I anticipate that I could realistically start with Volterra Fietta approximately 3 to 3.5 months after a formal offer is made and accepted. If required, I would be open to discussing:
- A slightly earlier start date with some remote handover support to my current team; or
- A later start date if there is a desire to avoid overlap with particularly intensive hearings or filings.

In summary, subject to fulfilling my contractual three‑month notice period, I expect that I could be available to start between 2025-04-01 and 2025-05-01, depending on the timing of any offer and mutual agreement on transition logistics.
